channel.title: Warrenville Proud Blog
channel.description: Local guides, weekly event roundups, and stories from Warrenville, Illinois.

item.title: A Walker's Guide to St. James Farm, Warrenville's Quiet Gem
item.description: An easy two-mile loop through a former family estate, complete with old stone buildings, big open meadows, and a little surprise art along the way. Here is how to make the most of it.

item.title: Your Week Ahead in Warrenville: June 17-23
item.description: Movies in the park, live lunchtime music, and the first signs of Fourth of July season. Here is what is happening around town this week.

item.title: 5 Free Things to Do in Warrenville This Summer
item.description: You do not need to leave town or spend a dime to have a great summer here. Five favorites, from movies in the park to the best weekend of the year.
